title: conmon path should include alternates
body: We should look for conmon in /usr/libexec/crio and /usr/local/libexec/crio.  I'm also wondering about the reasoning of having a crio directory housing a single binary.

comments.body: I think there is a chance other content could be added their in the future.  What does CRI-O do currently?  Does it look in both places or only in the default?

The problem is until we have packaging this remains sort of loose.  I don't expect our packages to install to /usr/local/libexec/crio which is where we currently look.  The latter question was really just a question.
Yes having a search path would be fine.
